languages.text: "Вашими же стараниями Янус стал игрушкой в руках пресыщенной аристократки, видящей в нем лишь источник собственных благ. Это сулит ему лишь упадок и запустение, и лишь я знаю, как не допустить подобного".

"Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."
languages.original_text: "Вашими же стараниями Янус стал игрушкой в руках пресыщенной аристократки, видящей в нем лишь источник собственных благ. Это сулит ему лишь упадок и запустение, и лишь я знаю, как не допустить подобного".

traits.locale_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

"Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

"Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

"Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

languages.text: «Debido a su incompetencia, Janus se ha convertido en el juguete de un aristócrata de estómago agradecido que solamente lo ve como un medio para su enriquecimiento personal. Esto no le depara nada más que declive y desolación, y yo soy el único que sabe cómo evitar tan aciago destino».
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: «Debido a su incompetencia, Janus se ha convertido en el juguete de un aristócrata de estómago agradecido que solamente lo ve como un medio para su enriquecimiento personal. Esto no le depara nada más que declive y desolación, y yo soy el único que sabe cómo evitar tan aciago destino».

languages.text: “而拜你所赐，如今的加努斯已沦为贪婪贵族手中的玩物。在那位贵族眼里，这个地方只是中饱私囊的工具。这样下去，只会把它拖向衰败与荒芜，而只有我才知道该如何阻止这一切。”
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: “而拜你所赐，如今的加努斯已沦为贪婪贵族手中的玩物。在那位贵族眼里，这个地方只是中饱私囊的工具。这样下去，只会把它拖向衰败与荒芜，而只有我才知道该如何阻止这一切。”

languages.text: « Par votre entremise, cette planète est devenue le jouet d'une aristocrate imbue de sa personne qui n'y voit guère qu'un moyen de s'enrichir. La voie la plus sûre vers le déclin et la désolation, et un destin funeste que je suis le seul à pouvoir éviter. »
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: « Par votre entremise, cette planète est devenue le jouet d'une aristocrate imbue de sa personne qui n'y voit guère qu'un moyen de s'enrichir. La voie la plus sûre vers le déclin et la désolation, et un destin funeste que je suis le seul à pouvoir éviter. »

languages.text: "Senin yüzünden Janus, orayı sadece kendi zenginleşmesi için bir kaynak olarak gören doymak bilmez bir aristokratın elinde oyuncak hâline geldi. Bu, oraya gerilemeden ve yıkımdan başka bir şey vadetmiyor. Böyle bir kaderi nasıl önleyeceğimi bir tek ben biliyorum."
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: "Senin yüzünden Janus, orayı sadece kendi zenginleşmesi için bir kaynak olarak gören doymak bilmez bir aristokratın elinde oyuncak hâline geldi. Bu, oraya gerilemeden ve yıkımdan başka bir şey vadetmiyor. Böyle bir kaderi nasıl önleyeceğimi bir tek ben biliyorum."

languages.text: 「あなたの努力によって、ヤヌスは飽食の貴族の遊び道具となり、彼女にとっての富の源泉にしか見られなくなりました。ヤヌスは衰退と荒廃しか約束されず、その運命を阻止する方法を知るのは私だけです。」
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの努力によって、ヤヌスは飽食の貴族の遊び道具となり、彼女にとっての富の源泉にしか見られなくなりました。ヤヌスは衰退と荒廃しか約束されず、その運命を阻止する方法を知るのは私だけです。」

languages.text: "Dank Eurer Bemühungen ist Janus mittlerweile ein Spielzeug in den Händen einer Aristokratin, die den Planeten nutzt, um sich persönlich zu bereichern. Das verspricht wiederum nichts als Niedergang und Verwüstung, und nur ich weiß, wie man ein derartiges Schicksal verhindern kann."
languages.original_text: "Through your efforts, Janus has become a plaything in the hands of a glutted aristocrat who sees in it only a source of her own enrichment. This promises it nothing but decline and desolation, and I alone know how to prevent such a fate."

traits.locale_text: "Dank Eurer Bemühungen ist Janus mittlerweile ein Spielzeug in den Händen einer Aristokratin, die den Planeten nutzt, um sich persönlich zu bereichern. Das verspricht wiederum nichts als Niedergang und Verwüstung, und nur ich weiß, wie man ein derartiges Schicksal verhindern kann."
